description: Create a path named 'Equator Through Ecuador' tracing latitude 0° from Ecuador's Pacific coast to its eastern border. Create a placemark named 'Mitad del Mundo Monument' at the monument near Quito (approximately 0°0'0", 78°27'W) with coordinates and equator path distance in the description. Organize both in a folder named 'Ecuador Equator Project' and export to /home/ga/Documents/ecuador_equator.kml.

metadata.geographic_reference: Ecuador - country named after the equator
